title: EcoBag 20 Pack Black Rubble Bags 30L, 80 Microns -Recyclable Large Rubble Sacks Heavy Duty, Leak Resistant Rubble Sacks, Eco-Friendly Garden Sacks, Bin Liners for Builders Bags, Kitchen (508x762mm)
features: Eco-friendly and recyclable material – Made from 98% recycled plastic, these rubble sacks heavy duty design supports sustainable disposal. Fully recyclable after use, ideal for eco-conscious projects and contractors.

Strong and tear-resistant build – Heavy duty garden bags Designed for demanding jobs, these heavy duty rubble sacks resist rips and punctures. Perfect for handling bricks, gravel, tiles, soil, or other rough building waste.
Leak resistant and mess-free – With a 80 micron thickness, these garden rubble bags heavy duty construction keeps sharp, wet, or heavy waste contained—great for indoor and outdoor use.

Multi-purpose sacks for home or trade – Use as builders bags, heavy duty garden waste bags, refuse sacks, or soil bags. Trusted by gardeners, DIYers, caterers, and tradespeople for everyday tough tasks.

20 pack with 30L capacity each – Each extra strong bin bags heavy duty measures 508 x 762 mm and is compact yet durable. Ideal for smaller loads of rubble, garden cuttings, or heavy-duty waste at home or on site.
